meaning: v.回忆,想起,记起,忆起,记得
examples: As far as I can recollect, she wasn't there on that occasion.
I don't recollect what he said.
Recollect launched its public beta on October 25 with Twitter, Instagram, Foursquare, and (of course) Flickr.
And I recollect that I was hosting a radio program the day of the match.
